regate_review_needed.name: WEBSTER DENTAL CARE OF CICERO
regate_review_needed.reason_flagged: network-level mso_platform_pe_evidence is documented but per-row text lacked platform keywords, so the row-scoped re-gate downgraded it. Gate Owner should reconcile to branded_dso.
regate_review_needed.network_mso_platform_pe_evidence: Webster Dental Management is a documented management/MSO entity: the official practice website webdentalchicago.com lists a separate leadership team page at websterdentalmanagement.com/about/. NPPES records list 'WEBSTER DENTAL MANAGEMENT' as parent_company on two cluster locations. The organization appointed an external CEO (Michael Errin Rios) in 2020, describing WDC as 'an industry leading dental service organization.' No PE sponsor identified; as of 2018 Group Dentistry Now documented it as 'owned by two dentists, without any venture capital partners.' MSO/management layer confirmed; PE=false. Sources: https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/webster-dental-care-announces-new-interim-chief-executive-officer-301139244.html and https://www.webdentalchicago.com/ and https://www.groupdentistrynow.com/dso-group-blog/group-dentistry-nows-emerging-dental-groups-to-watch-in-2018/

candidates_unresolved.name: ALL PERFECT SMILES OF ELMHURST PC
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: All Perfect Smiles of Elmhurst PC shares the 'All Perfect Smiles'/'Perfect Smiles' consumer brand and the same AO (Oscar Geovanni Gonzalez DDS MBA, Director of Operations) with the Beverly location. BBB corroborates this is a multi-location group under Dr. Lena Halikias as President. The PC entity structure with a Director of Operations is consistent with a DSO/MSO managed group. No documentary MSO/PE filing was found for the All Perfect Smiles sub-group, so pe_backed=null and gate_status=candidate. Candidate_tier is stealth_dso rather than dentist_multi because the 'Director of Operations' AO title (not an owner-dentist title) and the PC entity structure with multiple offices and an apparent management layer suggest a management-services arrangement — but MSO documentary proof is absent.

candidates_unresolved.name: ALL PERFECT SMILES OF BEVERLY PC
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: All Perfect Smiles of Beverly PC is the apparent anchor location for the 'All Perfect Smiles'/'Perfect Smiles' consumer brand group. The group website (allperfectsmiles.com) is active with 8 doctors listed, confirming a corporate multi-provider structure. The AO is Oscar Gonzalez in an administrative/operations director capacity. The PC entity structure with a Director of Operations and multiple branded locations is consistent with stealth_dso — but the missing element is a documentary management-company URL or PE filing specifically for the All Perfect Smiles sub-group. Dr. Lena Halikias appears as President per BBB, which may indicate a dentist-owned model with a management layer, but this is not confirmed from a management-services filing. pe_backed=null (no PE evidence found). gate_status=candidate because the MSO/management-services layer is inferred from structure, not documented with a URL.

candidates_unresolved.name: BRIGHT DENTAL CARE
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: KHALIL TAKLA is the AO on this Lombard NPI. Documentary evidence confirms Bright Dental Care PC (dba Smile Dental Care) is Dr. Khalil Takla's entity, making this dentist_multi. However, Yelp reports this location CLOSED, so gate_status stays candidate pending active-status verification. No MSO or PE evidence found.

candidates_unresolved.name: 7011 W ARCHER AVE
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: AO identity (KHALIL TAKLA) and a DentalPlans listing confirm Dr. Takla at this 60638 Chicago address, making network membership clear — dentist_multi is the correct tier. However, the bare-address NPPES org name, shared phone with the 60632 location, and absence of a distinct brand name raise a possible duplicate/stale-listing concern. Gate_status is candidate pending physical verification that 7011 W Archer Ave is a genuinely separate operating office and not a satellite or relocated listing of the 60632 Brown Archer Dental office.

candidates_unresolved.name: WEBSTER DENTAL CARE OF CICERO
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: WEBSTER DENTAL CARE OF CICERO at 6130 W Cermak Rd is a confirmed Webster Dental Care branded location (same brand/AO as 3 corroborated locations) but is CLOSED per Yelp as of May 2026 and is not listed on the active webdentalchicago.com/locations/ page. Classified as branded_dso (same network) but gate_status=candidate because (1) this specific location lacks NPPES parent_company corroboration, (2) it is likely closed/stale and should not remain in the active GP denominator. The downstream gate should validate closure and consider reclassification to solo_inactive or removal from the active denominator.

candidates_unresolved.name: PALOS HEIGHTS DENTAL GROUP, P.C.
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: Roshan Parikh is confirmed as authorized official and practicing dentist at this Palos Heights address, and he is the founder of the PE-backed GLDP DSO. However, 12130 S Harlem Ave does not appear on the GLDP public locator — a different Palos Heights address (7550 W College Dr) is shown there. Connection to GLDP is structurally very likely given the AO identity, but address-level locator confirmation is missing. Gate status: candidate pending that confirmation.

candidates_unresolved.name: CSG DENTAL IV, P.C.
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: CSG Dental IV PC at 1 E Wacker Dr (a commercial office tower, Suite 400) with 0 providers is the corporate/administrative entity for Roshan Parikh's GLDP management structure. 'CSG' (Chicagoland Smile Group) was his original friendly-PC vehicle. The zero-provider count and office tower address make clear this is a management/billing/admin entity, not a clinical GP practice. It is definitively part of the GLDP branded_dso network (owner identity confirmed), but should be flagged as a probable non-clinical shell for denominator purposes. Gate status: candidate because no public-facing patient website exists for this entity at this address.
